purpose: Documents the 2026-03-24 architectural migration from prose-only CLAUDE.md enforcement to the three-layer .claude/ architecture (hooks/skills+agents/CLAUDE.md). Maps old prose rules in CLAUDE.md to new deterministic shell hooks (validate-master-write, validate-init-write-once, validate-progress-file, validate-archive-before-clear, verify-final-report). Maps old _commands/ prose-only specs to skill directories (.claude/skills/{p-track,p,master-plan-track,project-workflow,dashboard-ops,worker-protocol}/SKILL.md). Documents the three layers: Layer 1 (hooks: deterministic, cannot bypass), Layer 2 (skills+agents: structural, loaded when invoked), Layer 3 (CLAUDE.md: advisory). Provides 'How to add new commands/enforcement rules' authoring guides. Note: references `validate-init-write-once.sh` which has been renamed to `validate-initialization-immutable.sh`.
gotchas: References hook name `validate-init-write-once.sh` — this has since been renamed to `validate-initialization-immutable.sh`. Doc is slightly stale.
Lists only 2 skills loaded for master agent (p-track, worker-protocol) — actual master-orchestrator.md now loads 4 (added master-protocol, failure-protocol)
Old root-level `skills/` archived to `Archive/pre-migration-skills/` — do not look there for current skills
patterns: Migration doc pattern: 'old location | new location | what it provides' tables
conventions: Date in title (2026-03-24) marks the migration event
